category.scope_note: Filtering facepiece respirator (FFP mask) compliance comparison: China domestic (GB 2626 KN95 / GB 19083) to Côte d'Ivoire market access via CODINORM standardisation and the Ministry of Trade Verification of Conformity (VoC) import inspection programme, drawing on NI standards that adopt EN 149 (FFP1/FFP2/FFP3).

title.en: China-to-Côte d'Ivoire PPE Respirator (FFP Mask) Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩呼吸器进入科特迪瓦（FFP）：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩呼吸器進入科特迪瓦（FFP）：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese PPE respirator (KN95 / GB 2626) documentation against Côte d'Ivoire market-access expectations: CODINORM national (NI) standards adopting EN 149, the Ministry of Trade Verification of Conformity (VoC) import-inspection programme, French-language documentation, the occupational safety framework, and the role of the local importer. Côte d'Ivoire does not operate an EU-style horizontal product regime (no RoHS / battery / outdoor-noise directives); requirements rest on the NI standards plus VoC conformity checks at import.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件与科特迪瓦市场准入预期对照：CODINORM采用EN 149的国家（NI）标准、贸易部进口合格验证（VoC）检验计划、法语文件、职业安全框架，以及本地进口商的角色。科特迪瓦不设欧盟式横向产品制度（无RoHS/电池/户外噪声指令）；相关要求基于NI标准加进口环节的VoC合格验证。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件與科特迪瓦市場准入預期對照：CODINORM採用EN 149的國家（NI）標準、貿易部進口合格驗證（VoC）檢驗計劃、法語文件、職業安全框架，以及本地進口商的角色。科特迪瓦不設歐盟式橫向產品制度（無RoHS/電池/戶外噪聲指令）；相關要求基於NI標準加進口環節的VoC合格驗證。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment determination, customs ruling, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Côte d'Ivoire law, CODINORM national (NI) standards, the Ministry of Trade Verification of Conformity (VoC) programme scope, and destination-country import-inspection practice with qualified regulatory professionals before shipment or placing products on the market. Côte d'Ivoire does not operate an EU-style horizontal product regime; the applicable requirements are standards-based plus VoC conformity inspection, and each consignment should be confirmed case by case.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商及分销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格的法规专业人士核验现行科特迪瓦法律、CODINORM国家（NI）标准、贸易部进口合格验证（VoC）计划范围及目的地国进口检验实践。科特迪瓦不设欧盟式横向产品制度；适用要求以标准为基础并辅以VoC合格验证检验，且每批货物宜逐案确认。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商及分銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格的法規專業人士核驗現行科特迪瓦法律、CODINORM國家（NI）標準、貿易部進口合格驗證（VoC）計劃範圍及目的地國進口檢驗實踐。科特迪瓦不設歐盟式橫向產品制度；適用要求以標準為基礎並輔以VoC合格驗證檢驗，且每批貨物宜逐案確認。

answer_first.en: Côte d'Ivoire has no EU-style PPE Regulation. Market access rests on two pillars: (1) CODINORM national (NI) standards, which adopt international references including EN 149 for FFP respirators (FFP1/FFP2/FFP3); and (2) the Ministry of Trade Verification of Conformity (VoC) import-inspection programme, under which consignments are checked against the applicable standard before clearance at Abidjan or San-Pédro. There is no CE-style self-affixed mark and no local Notified-Body equivalent; conformity is demonstrated to the VoC inspection body, documentation must be in French, and a resident Ivorian importer handles clearance. Chinese KN95 (GB 2626) reports are a useful technical baseline but do not by themselves meet EN 149; medical masks are handled through the national health regulator, not the PPE route.
answer_first.zh: 科特迪瓦没有欧盟式PPE法规。市场准入基于两大支柱：（1）CODINORM国家（NI）标准，其采用包括EN 149在内的国际参考标准用于FFP呼吸器（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）；（2）贸易部进口合格验证（VoC）检验计划，货物在阿比让或圣佩德罗清关前须依据适用标准接受检查。无CE式自我加贴标志，也无本地公告机构等效制度；合格性须向VoC检验机构证明，文件须为法语，并由常驻科特迪瓦的进口商负责清关。中国KN95（GB 2626）报告是有用的技术基线，但其本身不满足EN 149；医用口罩通过国家卫生监管机构处理，而非PPE路径。
answer_first.zht: 科特迪瓦沒有歐盟式PPE法規。市場准入基於兩大支柱：（1）CODINORM國家（NI）標準，其採用包括EN 149在內的國際參考標準用於FFP呼吸器（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）；（2）貿易部進口合格驗證（VoC）檢驗計劃，貨物在阿比讓或聖佩德羅清關前須依據適用標準接受檢查。無CE式自我加貼標誌，也無本地公告機構等效制度；合格性須向VoC檢驗機構證明，文件須為法語，並由常駐科特迪瓦的進口商負責清關。中國KN95（GB 2626）報告是有用的技術基線，但其本身不滿足EN 149；醫用口罩通過國家衛生監管機構處理，而非PPE路徑。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must cite an official regulator, standards body, or primary legal source (CODINORM, Ministry of Trade VoC programme, or the adopted EN/NI standard) with publisher, URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set true. Côte d'Ivoire requirements are standards-plus-VoC based; where no EU-style horizontal regime exists, rows must say so plainly rather than imply one.
